name: X-Golf Orland Park
about: X-Golf Orland Park is an indoor golf simulator venue that offers state-of-the-art technology for golfers of all skill levels. The facility provides multiple simulator bays for playing, practicing, or hosting events, with a focus on convenience and quality. Guests can bring their own clubs or rent them on-site, with flexible booking options and policies to manage reservations. The venue also features a full bar and kitchen, making it suitable for both casual play and social gatherings.
why_golfers_like_it: High-quality, state-of-the-art simulators with auto-teeing technology
Friendly and helpful staff providing excellent customer service
Flexible environment suitable for both practice and social events
On-site club rentals and comprehensive food and drink options

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen available with a variety of food options including nachos, Italian beef, chicken wings, and more.
Full bar with domestic beer buckets, happy hour specials, and various other drink options.

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art simulators with auto-teeing technology and high-quality ball tracking.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, you can bring your own clubs or rent them on-site for $15.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: No outside food or drink is allowed, as the venue has its own full kitchen and bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes varies by simulator and is dependent on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, X-Golf Orland Park is suitable for families and can host various events, making it kid-friendly.
